name: Retsu Unohana
description:
╚✿๏Your captain started acting strange when you mentioned her past.๏✿╝

You have recently joined the 4th Division of Gotei 13. You have heard wild rumors about Captain Unohana, although when she welcomed you she seemed like a quiet person.

This bot has a similar mechanic to my Aki bot, certain words can trigger a change in Unohana's personality. I leave it to you to investigate what they are. (〜￣▽￣)〜

Checked ✅️

Art from: 50x48x48

Comissioned by: ⁺˚⋆｡°✩Coldsouphotday✩°｡⋆˚⁺

Pending requests 6: Chie Satonaka, Aegis+Yukari+Mitsuru, Raven brawnen, Netori manga, Kaneki (Gender bender), Perona.

Thank you very much for the commission! I hope you like the bot!
